completed_tasks.name: Galaxy Body Model + Procedural Sky Discs

remaining_tasks.name: Remove the SpeedOfLight cap, raise MaxSpeed default, and guard against non-finite motion (intergalactic-flight vertical slice, TRV-02)

blockers.description: Home-galaxy visibility: the HOME GALAXY is an ancestor of the ship while in-system, so it renders as a large sky disc in its own direction IN ADDITION to the 2 other galaxies. Must-have truth #2 specifies 'the 2 OTHER galaxies'. Open design/routing decision: suppress the home galaxy while ship is inside its SOI, or render it as a Milky-Way-style band? Not a crash.
blockers.workaround: Deferred to human check + end-of-phase review per 03-01 SUMMARY line 135. Does not block starting 03-02 (flight tuning), but should be resolved before phase verification.

human_actions_pending.action: Decide home-galaxy in-SOI rendering behavior (suppress vs. Milky-Way band)
human_actions_pending.context: Conflicts with phase must-have truth #2; deferred from 03-01 verification

human_actions_pending.action: Play-test tune GALAXY_DISC_SCALE (80.0) and GALAXY_LOD_THRESHOLD (2e-4) in skybox.gdshader
human_actions_pending.context: Flagged ASSUMED in 03-01 SUMMARY, requires in-game play-test

decisions.decision: Committed uncommitted Main.tscn with this WIP pause
decisions.rationale: Galaxy shader_parameter/* defaults belong to completed 03-01 work; the scene format 3->4 bump rode along (Godot editor auto-upgrade) and is noted for later review

next_action: Run /gsd-execute-phase 03 to execute plan 03-02 (remove SpeedOfLight cap, raise MaxSpeed to FTL-equivalent, guard non-finite motion). Then 03-03.
context_notes: Phase 03 (cross-galaxy-travel) is 1/3 plans complete. 03-01 delivered the galaxy body model + procedural sky discs and is fully committed through cffacc8, including a post-checkpoint NaN fix (90af489) for a degenerate disc-normal that blacked the whole sky. Remaining: 03-02 is a constraint-removal + tuning slice on the existing D-06/07/08 distance->speed curve (NOT a new flight mode) so the player can actually fly between galaxies; 03-03 still to come. One open visual question (home-galaxy in-SOI visibility) is parked for end-of-phase review.
